---
name: New Skill Idea / Feature Request
about: Suggest a new skill or improvement
title: '[SKILL IDEA] brief description'
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
<!-- Describe the real-world pain point — be specific about who faces this problem and how often -->

**Who is this for?**
<!-- Not developers? Not technical users? Be specific -->

**What would the skill do?**
<!-- What input does it take? What output does it produce? -->

**Why will people share this?**
<!-- What's the "wow" moment that makes someone tell a friend? -->

**Does this already exist elsewhere?**
<!-- Have you checked awesome-claude-skills and VoltAgent/awesome-agent-skills? -->
